title: Dickory Dock
content:
Hickory, dickory dock!
    The mouse ran up the clock;
    The clock struck one,
    The mouse ran down,
    Hickory, dickory dock!
meaning:
"Dickory Dock" is a quintessential example of Walter Crane's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
